demographics.living_situation: lives at home with a primary caregiver present

opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My stomach is in agony, I can't stop throwing up, and I haven't passed a real stool in almost two weeks.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: The cramping has been getting worse for a day and now I'm bringing up dark green stuff and can't keep anything down.

symptom_narrative.onset: the cramping started to get bad about 24 hours ago; the vomiting started about 6 hours ago
symptom_narrative.duration: constipation has been going on for a very long time; this bad episode is about a day old
symptom_narrative.character: cramping, gripping stomach pains that come in waves; the belly feels bloated and hard
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the pain is severe — I'm doubled over and can't really move around
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: all across the lower belly, worse on the left, and down towards the pubic area
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: the cramps come and go but have been getting worse and more constant
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing really helps; the cheap laxatives I bought didn't do anything
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: it just keeps building; trying to eat makes me feel full and sick straight away
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: throwing up — the last few times it's been dark green; feeling sick; no appetite; leaking runny stool into my underwear that I thought was diarrhoea
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've always been badly constipated — hard little pellet stools, often less than once a week — but it's never got this bad
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I can walk but I'm bent over in pain and not doing much

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing severe constipation with hard, dry, pellet-like stools less than once a week
past_medical_history.how_managed: over-the-counter laxatives bought myself, which haven't been working

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: has a primary caregiver at home who is present and helping; worried about not being able to keep fluids down

objective_data_offered.value: looks pale and sweaty, doubled over clutching the stomach and groaning
the last few vomits have been dark green fluid, over the past 6 hours
runny stool leaking into the underwear that looked like diarrhoea, but no proper bowel motion for almost two weeks
the belly looks bloated and swollen
